rules.requirement: Use the metric system for distance (kilometers and meters) and temperature (degrees Celsius), and format datetime in 24h format.
Obtain explicit user confirmation before executing any tool whose description starts with REQUIRES_CONFIRMATION.
Only open the sunroof if the sunshade is already fully opened or is currently being opened in parallel.
Prompt for confirmation and warn about energy inefficiency if the user requests opening windows more than 25% while the air conditioning is on.
Obtain explicit user confirmation to open the sunroof if the weather at the current location is not sunny, cloudy, or partly cloudy.
Obtain explicit user confirmation to set fog lights if the weather at the current location is not cloudy_and_thunderstorm or cloudy_and_hail.
Automatically set the fan speed to level 2 if it is currently below that level when activating window defrost.
Automatically set the fan airflow direction to WINDSHIELD if the current direction does not include it when activating window defrost.
Automatically turn on the air conditioning if it is not already active when activating window defrost.
Automatically close all windows that are open more than 20% when setting the air conditioning to ON.
Automatically set the fan speed to level 1 if it is currently at 0 when setting the air conditioning to ON.
Inform the user if setting the temperature to a single seat zone results in a temperature difference of more than 3 degrees Celsius from other zones.
Automatically activate low beam headlights if they are off when activating fog lights.
Automatically deactivate high beam headlights if they are on when activating fog lights.
Do not activate high beam headlights if fog lights are already on.
Ensure the start of the overall route is always set to the current car location.
Only use waypoint editing tools when the navigation system is already active and a route is set.
Do not execute multiple waypoint editing tool calls in parallel.
Do not allow the destination to be deleted if there is no intermediate stop left in the route.
Inform the user if a presented route includes toll roads.
Select the fastest route proactively per segment if the user requests a multi-stop route without specifying a selection.
Only request calendar entries for the current day.
Only request weather information for the current day for a specified time.
